description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the Docker image oprudkyi/laravel-bootstrap-adminlte-starter-kit:test-php-7.0 as the default image and caches the directories vendor, node_modules, and .install-cache per job. Define a test stage with two jobs: test:php70 runs ./bootstrap.sh, ./configure, export COMPOSER_ALLOW_SUPERUSER=1, make install-dependencies, make -k check-functional and make -k check-acceptance; test:php71 runs the same script steps but uses the image oprudkyi/laravel-bootstrap-adminlte-starter-kit:test-php-7.1 and is allowed to fail. Add a deploy stage with a job named "deploy to production" that runs only on the master branch, sets the production environment with URL $PRODUCTION_URI, and executes echo Deploy production, eval $(ssh-agent -s), ssh-add <(echo "$PRODUCTION_SSH_PRIVATE_KEY"), and $PRODUCTION_DEPLOY_REMOTE_COMMAND.
